title: phaseolus vulgaris var. icterinus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. icterinus is a variety of the common bean plant, specifically known as the yellow stainer bean due to its bright yellow seeds. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat kidney and urinary tract issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of consuming Phaseolus vulgaris var. icterinus include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and providing essential nutrients such as protein and fiber. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
